### Issue Description

A test failure in xarray's build against the development versions of upstream packages (https://github.com/pydata/xarray/issues/8623) can be boiled down to the reproducible example above.  It seems like something goes wrong in casting an `int32` value to a `Timedelta` with the development version of NumPy.

### Expected Behavior

I would expect the example to run without an error:
```
>>> pd.to_timedelta(np.int32(0), "D")
Timedelta('0 days 00:00:00')
```
